message:
fix(cli): disambiguate util test function names to avoid collisions

Rename TestTruncateWithEllipsis, TestUniqueStrings, and
TestCountAgentStates to include _Util suffix, preventing name
collisions with identically-named tests in other packages when
running the full test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
